action.reasoning: Observation: iter 15 error: BCEWithLogitsLoss got unexpected keyword 'label_smoothing'. PyTorch's BCEWithLogitsLoss doesn't support label_smoothing parameter. Analysis: Need to implement label smoothing manually (shift labels toward 0.5) before loss computation. Also ensure no 'verbose' in scheduler. Decision: Rewrite train.py with manual label smoothing, fix scheduler, run 15 epochs (est. 2.5h) to improve generalization, then submit eval next iteration.
